src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-puntinamappa-001 title: validate `puntinamappa` class constructor and getter/setter methods for location attributes module: data model (puntinamappa) source files or pages: 1 covered methods: preconditions: - a `puntinamappa` object is instantiated. - valid and invalid input values are prepared for testing. test data: | attribute | valid value | invalid value | |--------------------|---------------------------|-----------------------------| | longitudine | 12.4567 | -181.0, "abc", 181.0 | | latitudine | 41.8901 | -91.0, "xyz", 91.0 | | qualitaaria | 50 | -1, 1000, "text" | | temperatura | 25 | -300, 600, "hot" | | umidita | 65.5 | -100.0, 101.0, "high" | | vento | 12.3 | -50.0, 200.0, "strong" | | pressione | 1013 | -1000, 3000, "low" | | categoria | "moderata" | "unknown", 123, null | test steps: 1. instantiate `puntinamappa` with valid coordinates: `puntinamappa(12.4567, 41.8901)`. 2. verify `getlongitudine()` and `getlatitudine()` return the correct values. 3. set and get each attribute (e.g., `settemperatura(25)`, then `gettemperatura()`). 4. attempt to set invalid values (e.g., `setlatitudine(-91.0)`). 5. verify the object rejects invalid inputs (e.g., throws exception or ignores change). 6. set `categoria` to each enum value ("buona", "moderata", etc.) and confirm `getcategoria()` reflects changes. 7. attempt to set `categoria` to an invalid value (e.g., "unknown") and verify rejection. expected result: - valid inputs are accepted and retrieved correctly. - invalid inputs (out-of-range, wrong type) are rejected with appropriate error handling (e.g., exception, validation message). - enum values for `categoria` are restricted to predefined options. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-puntinamappa-002 title: validate `puntinamappa` association with `suggerimento` objects module: data model (puntinamappa-suggerimento) source files or pages: 1 covered methods: preconditions: - a `puntinamappa` object is created with `categoria = "moderata"`. - multiple `suggerimento` objects are created with matching and non-matching categories. test data: | suggerimento title | categoria (suggerimento) | expected association | |--------------------------|--------------------------|-----------------------| | "indossa una mascherina" | "moderata" | yes | | "riduci attività all'aperto" | "insalubre" | no | | "nessun suggerimento" | "buona" | no | test steps: 1. create a `puntinamappa` with `categoria = "moderata"`. 2. add a `suggerimento` with `categoria = "moderata"` and verify it is associated with `puntinamappa`. 3. attempt to add a `suggerimento` with `categoria = "insalubre"` and verify it is **not** associated. 4. add a `suggerimento` with `categoria = "buona"` and verify no association. 5. retrieve all associated `suggerimento` objects from `puntinamappa` and confirm only matching categories are included. expected result: - only `suggerimento` objects with matching `categoria` are associated with `puntinamappa`. - non-matching categories are ignored or rejected. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-location-selection-001 title: validate location selection flow (state, region, city) module: user interaction (position selection) source files or pages: 2, 5, 6, 9 covered methods: preconditions: - user is on the initial screen (`schermata iniziale`). - api (`airvisual api`) is mockable and returns test data. test data: | step | valid input | invalid input | |-------------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------------------| | seleziona stato | "italia" | "", null, "state999" | | seleziona regione | "lombardia" | "", null, "regionxxx" | | seleziona città | "milano" | "", null, "city123" | test steps: 1. user selects a valid state (e.g., "italia") from the dropdown. 2. system loads and displays valid regions (e.g., "lombardia", "veneto"). 3. user selects a valid region ("lombardia"). 4. system loads and displays valid cities (e.g., "milano", "bergamo"). 5. user selects a valid city ("milano"). 6. system sends request to `airvisual api` and displays returned data. 7. repeat steps 1–6 with invalid inputs (e.g., empty state, non-existent city). 8. verify system handles invalid selections gracefully (e.g., error message, no data load). expected result: - valid selections trigger successful api calls and data display. - invalid selections are rejected with user feedback (e.g., "città non trovata"). - api errors (e.g., network failure) are handled (e.g., retry or timeout message). unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-location-selection-002 title: validate current position selection and data display module: user interaction (current location) source files or pages: 2, 8 covered methods: preconditions: - user grants location permissions. - gps/mock location is enabled (e.g., latitude: 41.8901, longitude: 12.4567). - `airvisual api` returns data for the mock location. test data: test steps: 1. user selects "seleziona la tua posizione attuale" on the initial screen. 2. system requests location permissions. - **branch 1:** user grants permission. - system fetches current coordinates. - system sends request to `airvisual api` with coordinates. - system displays data for the current location. - **branch 2:** user denies permission. - system shows error message: "permesso negato. seleziona manualmente la posizione." 3. user scrolls down to trigger data refresh (`ricaricare i dati scrolling giu`). 4. system fetches updated data from `airvisual api` and updates the map. 5. repeat step 3 to verify continuous refresh loop. expected result: - granted permissions → data loads and displays correctly. - denied permissions → user is prompted to select manually. - scroll refresh → map updates with new data (or shows loading state). - api errors during refresh → user sees retry option or error message. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-data-display-001 title: validate map data presentation and updates module: ui/ux (map activity) source files or pages: 3, 8 covered methods: preconditions: - initial map data is loaded for a location (e.g., milano). - `airvisual api` simulates delayed or failed responses. test data: test steps: 1. user views `mappa iniziale` with loaded data (e.g., air quality: "moderata"). 2. user scrolls down to trigger refresh. 3. system sends request to `airvisual api`. - **branch 1:** api returns updated data (e.g., air quality changes to "insalubre"). - map updates to reflect new data. - `categoria` in `puntinamappa` is updated. - **branch 2:** api returns empty data. - system shows "nessun dato disponibile" and disables refresh. - **branch 3:** api times out. - system shows "ricarica fallita. riprova tra 5 secondi." 4. user presses the "suggerimenti" button. 5. system navigates to `schermata suggerimenti` with tips matching the current `categoria`. expected result: - data updates are reflected on the map in real-time. - empty/failed api responses are handled with user-friendly messages. - navigation to suggestions screen shows relevant tips (e.g., "moderata" → general advice; "pericolosa" → urgent actions). unit: project:
